# Brownfield Migration Spec — a policy administration system on WebLogic 11

## Application Summary
a policy administration system on WebLogic 11

## Modernization Scope
all three integrations are in scope

## Integration Inventory

### Integration: INT-001 — Policy admin UI
- **Technology + version:** ADF on WebLogic 11
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** hard-cutover
- **API surface / contract:** internal pages
- **State management:** session sticky
- **Data volume + SLA:** 400K sessions/day p95 < 800ms
- **Target intent:** React SPA on CloudFront
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-002 — Policy rules and service tier
- **Technology + version:** EJB 3 on WebLogic 11
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** bidirectional
- **Criticality:** critical
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** internal REST undocumented
- **State management:** stateful
- **Data volume + SLA:** 1.5M requests/day p95 < 500ms
- **Target intent:** Spring Boot services on ECS
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

### Integration: INT-003 — Rating service
- **Technology + version:** SOAP client v1 cross-cloud
- **Integration type:** sync api
- **Data flow direction:** read-only
- **Criticality:** high
- **Coexistence constraint:** dual-read
- **API surface / contract:** WSDL documented
- **State management:** stateless
- **Data volume + SLA:** 700K ratings/day p95 < 600ms
- **Target intent:** Apigee GCP client cross-cloud
<!-- confidence 1.00 (filled 8/8) -->

## Non-Functional Requirements (Application-Wide)
- the service must be available 99.9% of the time
